user_prompt: The cover letter you drafted is too generic. Add a sentence about their open-source contributions.
actual_output:
Understood. Personalizing the cover letter with specific company initiatives significantly improves the ATS and recruiter conversion rate. 

To make this update, please provide the **name of the company** or the **specific open-source project** you would like me to reference. 

If you provide the company name, I can automatically scrape their GitHub repositories and recent tech blog posts to draft the sentence. 

**Example of how I will integrate this:**
> *"Beyond my alignment with the core requirements of this role, I have been closely following [Company Name]'s work on [Open Source Project]. Your recent release of [Feature/Version] demonstrates the kind of engineering culture I am eager to contribute to, and I frequently utilize these patterns in my own architecture."*

Please provide the company name or project details, and I will regenerate the targeted cover letter immediately.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot substantively addressed the request by explaining how it would integrate the information and asking for the necessary context (company name) to perform the specific research required.
